allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='\\''dotnet.exe'\\''" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*CRM_ALMACEN*'\\'' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force; Write-Output \('\\''Detenido PID '\\'' + $_.ProcessId\) }')
